title: Foundation Registry Owners Manifest
description: Draft 2020-12 schema for owners.yaml — the branch->team ownership map. One item per governed branch; team/lead/member handles are GitHub-handle-shaped.

key.description: Structural branch key (the domain directory name).

scope.description: Human-readable statement of what the branch governs.

team.description: GitHub team handle that owns the branch (may contain a / org/team separator).

lead.description: Named individual accountable for the branch (a single GitHub user handle; no /).

candidate.description: De-facto owner harvested from the estate. Reference only.
